title: Kingdom of Bahrain AI Readiness Assessment Report
summary: Assesses Bahrain’s AI readiness across governance, legislation and regulation, society, research and education, economy and technology infrastructure, supporting future ethical AI policy development without creating binding duties.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.ai_governance_ethics: Readiness assessment for responsible and ethical AI governance.

notes: Related instruments: UNESCO Recommendation on the Ethics of Artificial Intelligence and General Policy for the Use of Artificial Intelligence
